cases.description: Click controls repeatedly and verify cumulative DOM and structured state.
cases.html: <!doctype html><html><head><title>Sequence 00</title></head><body><output id="state" data-value="0" data-clicks="0">value=0; clicks=0</output><button id="one" onclick="bump(1)">One</button><button id="delta" onclick="bump(2)">Delta</button><script>function bump(n){const s=document.querySelector('#state');const v=Number(s.dataset.value)+n;const c=Number(s.dataset.clicks)+1;s.dataset.value=String(v);s.dataset.clicks=String(c);s.textContent='value='+v+'; clicks='+c}</script></body></html>

steps.expression: () => { const s = document.querySelector('#state'); return { value: Number(s.dataset.value), clicks: Number(s.dataset.clicks) }; }
